documentation_gates.notes: Closeout docs, tracked state, runtime, and PR evidence ownership are locked through the shared matrix.
Promotion checklist and tracked evidence ledger are now part of the workflow-v2 docs bundle.

operational_gates.notes: Manual handoff is now locked as an exception-only path for high-risk, anchor-extension, and exceptional recovery cases; provider waits use pause + scheduled resume.
Live smoke now has a required trigger matrix, canonical Actual Verification evidence source, and a recurring rehearsal cadence.
Scheduler standard now locks macOS launchd as the team-shared default, non-macOS fallback commands, and verify/watch cadence.

promotion_gate.next_review_trigger: After incident-aware audit rerun confirms that only promotion drift and runtime/observability families remain open
promotion_gate.notes: Representative replay acceptance passes. Recent fixes reduced several families to monitoring: closeout projection (OMO-07-002), authority_precheck contract (OMO-07-004), PR/CI drift (OMO-07-005, OMO-07-006), and session/cost (OMO-07-008). Promotion remains not-ready because active open blocker families still remain: promotion drift (OMO-RETRO-003) and runtime/observability (OMO-07-003, OMO-07-007). Slice03 historical artifact gap and retrospective 03-05 umbrella are recorded with artifact-missing accepted disposition and are no longer treated as active blockers.
